file_name: 2025 County Health Rankings Virginia Data - v4.csv
desc: This dataset contains county-level health rankings and related data for the state of Virginia, covering various health indicators and social determinants of health. The data is sourced from the County Health Rankings & Roadmaps program and provides insights into the health status and factors affecting health outcomes in Virginia counties.
file_path: data/outcome/County-Health-Rankings-&-Roadmaps/2025 County Health Rankings Virginia Data - v4.csv
raw_file_path: data/sources/County-Health-Rankings-&-Roadmaps/2025 County Health Rankings Virginia Data - v4.xlsx

columns.name: Average Number of Physically Unhealthy Days
columns.desc: Average number of reported physically unhealthy days per month

columns.name: % Low Birth Weight
columns.desc: Percentage of live births with low birth weight

columns.name: Average Number of Mentally Unhealthy Days
columns.desc: Average number of reported mentally unhealthy days per month

columns.name: % Fair or Poor Health
columns.desc: Percentage of adults reporting fair or poor health

columns.name: % Vaccinated
columns.desc: Percentage of adults who have received recommended vaccines

columns.name: % Smokers
columns.desc: Percentage of adults who are current smokers

columns.name: % With Access to Exercise Opportunities
columns.desc: Percentage of adults with access to exercise opportunities

columns.name: Food Environment Index
columns.desc: Index measuring the availability and quality of healthy food options in the county, on a scale of 1-10, with higher scores indicating better food environments.

columns.name: # Primary Care Physicians
columns.desc: Number of primary care physician in each county

columns.name: Primary Care Physicians Rate
columns.desc: Rate of primary care physicians per 100,000 people

columns.name: # Mental Health Providers
columns.desc: Number of mental health providers in each county

columns.name: Mental Health Provider Rate
columns.desc: Rate of mental health providers per 100,000 people in each county

columns.name: # Dentists
columns.desc: Number of dentists in each county

columns.name: Dentist Rate
columns.desc: Rate of dentists per 100,000 people in each county

columns.name: Preventable Hospitalization Rate
columns.desc: Discharges for Ambulatory Care Sensitive Conditions per 100,000 Medicare Enrollees

columns.name: % with Annual Mammogram
columns.desc: Percentage of female Medicare enrollees having an annual mammogram (age 65-74)

columns.name: % Uninsured
columns.desc: Percentage of the county under age 65 that is uninsured

columns.name: % Severe Housing Problems
columns.desc: Percentage of households with at least 1 of 4 housing problems: overcrowding, high housing costs, or lack of kitchen or plumbing facilities

columns.name: % Long Commute - Drives Alone
columns.desc: Among workers who commute in their car alone, the percentage that commute more than 30 minutes

columns.name: Average Daily PM2.5
columns.desc: Average daily amount of fine particulate matter in micrograms per cubic meter (PM2.5) in the air. An indication of air quality.

columns.name: Presence of Water Violation
columns.desc: Indicates with a Yes/No whether there has been a water violation in the county

columns.name: % Households with Broadband Access
columns.desc: Percentage of households in the county that have broadband access

columns.name: % Completed High School
columns.desc: Percentage of adults age 25 and over with a high school diploma or equivalent

columns.name: % Children in Poverty
columns.desc: Percentage of children under age 18 living in poverty

columns.name: # Injury Deaths
columns.desc: Number of injury-related deaths in the county

columns.name: Injury Death Rate
columns.desc: Rate of injury-related deaths per 100,000 population in the county

columns.name: % Household Income Required for Child Care Expenses
columns.desc: Percentage of median household income required for child care expenses for two children
